character.level.description: Section 'c' byte offset 24 stores the character level as a little-endian float64.

character.free_skill_points.description: Section 'c' byte offset 48 stores free skill points as a little-endian float64.

character.free_mastery_points.description: Section 'c' byte offset 204 stores free mastery points as a little-endian float64.
